# Luiz R R P Ihara

**Quality Engineer [AI-Driven Testing | Automation | Performance]**

* Email: luiz.ihara@gmail.com
* GitHub: https://github.com/luizihara
* LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/luiz-ihara/

## About Me

Quality Engineer with strong experience in performance, scalability, and reliability across end-to-end backend, frontend, and mobile applications. Over the past few years, I have focused on improving system performance and resilience through stress testing and validation in Linux environments, ensuring systems can handle high-traffic scenarios with confidence.

Experienced in designing and scaling test strategies, as well as building automation frameworks using Java, JavaScript, Python, Go, and Shell Script. I have worked extensively with CI/CD pipelines, implementing quality gates and testing guardrails to ensure reliability and consistency throughout the software delivery lifecycle.

Strong background in infrastructure and platform engineering, including managing cloud environments, virtual machines, and Kubernetes clusters. Passionate about Infrastructure as Code (IaC), I have implemented automation solutions using tools such as Terraform and Ansible to improve scalability, reduce manual operations, and enhance system resilience.

I have also led initiatives around code quality and platform governance, supporting large-scale environments with thousands of projects across multiple technologies, ensuring high standards of maintainability and engineering efficiency.

I have been leveraging AI-driven approaches to accelerate test generation, improve coverage, and enhance overall engineering productivity, helping teams deliver with greater confidence and speed. Additionally, I design and implement synthetic testing solutions to improve observability and proactively detect issues in production environments.

## Professional Experience

### Quality Assurance Engineer @ iConnections
**April/2025 - Present**
* Leading quality architecture initiatives across backend, frontend, mobile, and performance testing, ensuring scalable and reliable validation strategies across the platform.
* Applying AI-driven approaches to accelerate test creation, improve coverage, and elevate engineering efficiency and product quality.
* Designing and implementing synthetic testing solutions to strengthen observability and enable proactive detection of production issues.

### Staff QA Engineer @ XP Inc
**April/2020 - April/2025**
* Led the SonarQube platform as Tech Lead, owning code quality governance for 3,000+ projects across multiple stacks (.NET, JavaScript, Golang, Python, and Java).
* Drove scalability, reliability, and CI/CD integration strategies, empowering engineering teams to adopt high-quality standards and improve overall software maintainability. 
* Owned the maintenance and evolution of CI/CD pipelines built on Azure DevOps, with a strong focus on implementing testing guardrails across the entire pipeline.
* Established quality gates and automated validation processes to ensure reliability, consistency, and high standards throughout the software delivery lifecycle.

### SRE / DevOps Engineer @ Grupo Netshoes
**October/2015 - March/2020**
* Led quality engineering initiatives as a Tech Lead, designing and implementing a scalable test automation framework (Java, Selenium, REST Assured) and establishing CI pipelines in Jenkins to ensure consistent and reliable test execution.
* Transitioned into an SRE / DevOps Engineer role, owning the company’s core high-traffic service (homepage). 
* Drove reliability and scalability improvements by implementing infrastructure automation with Terraform and Ansible, enabling efficient scaling and enhancing overall system resilience.

### Software Developer in Test @ Fcamara (LTM, Cnova)
**March/2014 - October/2015**

### QA Analyst @ Dotz
**October/2012 - March/2014**

### QA Analyst @ Spread (Claro)
**April/2011 - October/2012**

### QA Analyst @ RSI Informática (Caixa)
**August/2009 - April/2011**

## Skill Highlights

* **IDE:** Cursor, Visual Studio Code, Antigravity
* **Languages:** Bash / Shell Script, TypeScript / JavaScript, Python, C#, Java, Go
* **Frameworks:** Playwright, Cypress, Appium, WebdriverIO, Selenium
* **Performance:** k6, Tsung, JMeter, Locust
* **Monitoring:** Grafana, Datadog, Dynatrace, New Relic, Sensu
* **CI/CD:** Azure DevOps, Jenkins, CircleCI, GitHub Actions
* **Cloud:** Microsoft Azure, GCP, AWS
* **OS / Containers:** Linux Ubuntu, Linux Red Hat, Kubernetes, Docker, Podman
* **Others:** DevOps, Terraform, Ansible, Akamai, Azion, Cloudflare, Redis, Memcached
